title: mentha × villosa var. morrenii
intro: Mentha × villosa var. morrenii, also known as Morrell's mint or woolly mint, is a variety of the woolly mint plant, which is a hybrid of spearmint and watermint. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues and soothe digestive problems. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. morrenii include its ability to ease congestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil for its medicinal uses.
